title: Why the Rise and Fall Lens Matters
body:
The lens matters because it helps you notice fragility before it becomes obvious. Civilisations often look strongest just before the systems that support them become overextended.

It is also useful for modern policy, because it reminds decision-makers that resilience is as important as growth.
keyPoints: It turns history into a warning system
furtherReading: Vaclav Smil, 'How the World Really Works'
